CONTENT.Career: Netz was born in Berlin, Germany. He made his professional debut for Hertha BSC in the Bundesliga on 2 January 2021, coming on as a substitute in the 86th minute for Marvin Plattenhardt against Schalke 04. The home match finished as a 3–0 win for Hertha. On 13 February 2021, Netz scored his first Bundesliga goal in the 82nd minute against VfB Stuttgart. His goal equalized the game, and the match ended in a 1-1 draw.
CONTENT.Honours: IndividualFritz Walter Medal U19 Silver: 2022Fritz Walter Medal U17 Bronze: 2020

SUMMARY: Luca Netz (born 15 May 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach.
